Permanently enchant boots to give +3 Intellect.

Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 60 minutes. 
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 100 damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target. Only affects Elemental, Giant, Undead, and Mechanical enemies. 105 charges.

Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 60 minutes. 
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 128 damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target. Only affects Elemental, Giant, Undead, and Mechanical enemies. 105 charges.
